channel.title: GitHub Visual Basic .NET Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Visual Basic .NET in GitHub

item.title: pdftables/vba-pdftables-api
item.description: Visual Basic for Applications macros for using the PDFTables.com API; contributed by Dan Elgaard

item.title: OfficeDev/Office-IT-Pro-Deployment-Scripts
item.description: A collection of useful PowerShell scripts to make deploying Office 2016 and Office 365 ProPlus easier for IT Pros and administrators. If you have any feature requests or ideas for future scripts please add the idea to the issues list in this repository

item.title: NYAN-x-CAT/Lime-RAT
item.description: LimeRAT | Simple, yet powerful remote administration tool for Windows (RAT)
